name: Creamy Rice Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the rice, milk, sugar, butter, and salt to a 3-quart saucepan.
2. Stir over medium heat until tiny bubbles form around the edges, stirring the mixture frequently.
3. Reduce the heat to low and cover. Simmer for one hour or until the rice is very tender, stirring only occasionally.
4. Stir in vanilla. Cover and refrigerate until well chilled, about 3 hours.
5. To serve, spoon into dessert bowls and sprinkle with nutmeg.
FOR CREAMY PUDDING:
Omit butter. Refrigerate pudding. In a small bowl, beat heavy cream or whipped cream to soft peaks. With a rubber spatula, fold the cream into the pudding; spoon into dessert bowls and sprinkle with nutmeg.
